parsed.rationale: The input-assets montage provides concrete, visually specific constraints: a title zone, large native clustered column chart area, badge area, right observation rail, and bottom insight strip, plus a clear style reference specifying cream canvas, dark title blue, light demand bars, deeper capacity bars, and a teal-outlined right rail. The gold_turn1 deck visibly instantiates these constraints: slide 1 uses the prescribed chart-led layout and matching palette with a bottom insight strip; slide 2 uses the right-rail treatment and overall style; slide 3 preserves the benchmark context separately without contradicting the task. The gold_final deck preserves and appropriately revises the layout: slide 1 adds the badge and right observation rail while keeping the chart and insight strip in the intended positions and style, and slide 2 remains consistent. No obvious overlaps, crowding, or arbitrary styling contradictions are visible. Minor deviation: turn1 slide 1 lacks the badge/right rail from the reference, but the final deck clearly resolves this in line with the expected progression.
